name: X Idea Generator

skills.name: X Trend Research
skills.description: Researches trending topics and hashtags on X to generate post ideas.

skills.name: Content Angle Finder
skills.description: Takes a raw topic and finds unique angles, hooks, and perspectives.

_notes: This agent handles the creative brainstorming phase. Two skills: one for trends, one for angles.

name: X Copywriter

skills.name: X Post Writer
skills.description: Writes compelling X posts with optimized hooks and CTAs.

skills.name: X Thread Writer
skills.description: Structures long-form content into engaging X threads.

_notes: This agent does the actual writing. Two skills for different content formats.

name: X Editor & Optimizer

skills.name: X Post Reviewer
skills.description: Reviews posts for engagement, clarity, and best practices.

skills.name: Engagement Optimizer
skills.description: Optimizes posts for maximum reach using X algorithm best practices.

_notes: Quality control agent. Reviews and optimizes before publishing.
